taxonomy: Gonopyrum articulatum is classified within the family Poaceae, which is commonly known as the grass family. This classification places Gonopyrum articulatum among the monocots, a group of flowering plants with one cotyledon. The genus Gonopyrum is not well-represented in botanical literature, indicating its possible rarity or limited study.
